brand_identity.name: CitSpray
brand_identity.description: A high-performance order management system blending industrial reliability with fresh, organic energy. The interface prioritizes data density and workflow speed while using vibrant citrus accents to guide user attention.

usage_rules.headings: Use Manrope for all headings (h1-h4). Letter spacing should be slightly tight (-0.02em).
usage_rules.body: Use Public Sans for all body text, inputs, and tables. Enable tabular figures (font-feature-settings: 'tnum') for all numerical data.
usage_rules.caps: Use uppercase only for table headers, badges, and overlines (tracking-wider).

buttons.base: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

warehouse_context.usage: Dashboard widget background or empty state for Dispatch

rules: Ensure all text has a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background.
Interactive elements must have a focus ring visible via keyboard navigation.
Use semantic HTML (main, nav, aside, section) for proper screen reader support.
All images must have alt text.
Do not rely on color alone to convey status (use icons + text + color).
accessibility.test_attributes: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links) using kebab-case role-based naming (e.g., 'submit-order-btn', 'customer-search-input').

general: Do not use gradients for dark colors.
Avoid generic centered layouts; use grid-based or asymmetrical layouts where appropriate.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glassmorphism effects with backdrop filters (8-16px blur) for sticky headers.
Do not apply 'transition: all'; target specific properties (transform, opacity, colors).
Do not center align the app container text.
Use pill-shaped or rounded-lg button styles with interaction animations.
Micro-animations are mandatory for hover, focus, and active states.
component_reuse: Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui.
Create new components that match the style of existing ones.

tech_specific.language: JavaScript (.js, .jsx) - NO TypeScript syntax in code files

instructions_to_main_agent: Start by setting up the theme in tailwind.config.js using the colors provided. Then, update the index.css with the base styles and font imports. Create a Layout component that handles the Sidebar/Header structure and Theme Toggle. Build the Login page first using the 'login_bg' image. Then proceed to build role-specific dashboards (Telecaller, Packaging, Dispatch, Admin) using the 'bento' grid layout. Ensure all forms use Shadcn UI components customized with the 'inputs' and 'buttons' styles defined here.
